positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a bioluminescent rainforest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of tropical flora and exotic fauna. The main subject is a glowing river flowing through massive, stylized jungle leaves. Color palette: deep indigo, emerald green, cyan, and luminous gold highlights. The style should be clean vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor effects, emphasizing strong contrast and flat graphic elements. Composition must be circular or symmetrical for optimal apparel placement. High detail, sharp lines, suitable for screen printing, rule of thirds adherence. Studio quality, photorealistic rendering of the digital artwork.
